hero.title: Multi-Language NLP
hero.description: Explore practical natural language processing capabilities and how they scale into reliable, multilingual production systems.

foundations.title: NLP Foundations
foundations.description: Natural language processing combines linguistic signals and machine learning to extract meaning, intent, and structure from text.

workbench.title: Interactive NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Use the demo to test language detection, sentiment scoring, entity extraction, and translation behaviors in real time.

productionApplications.title: How Horizon Applies NLP in Production
productionApplications.description: NLP capabilities are integrated into business workflows with performance guardrails and clear quality metrics.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Reliability and Governance Principles
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Production NLP requires more than model quality; it depends on safe rollout practices and continuous verification.

foundations.intro1: Modern NLP systems power support automation, search relevance, knowledge extraction, and multilingual collaboration. Effective implementation requires both model quality and strong operational controls.
foundations.intro2: At Horizon, we focus on end-to-end NLP systems that combine robust inference with observability, governance, and measurable production impact.

languageDetection.title: Language Detection
languageDetection.description: Identifies language from short or long text segments to route requests into the right processing pipeline.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentAnalysis.description: Extracts emotional intent and polarity for customer intelligence, support triage, and product feedback loops.

entityExtraction.title: Entity Extraction
entityExtraction.description: Detects structured entities such as names, companies, locations, and dates from unstructured text.

translation.title: Translation
translation.description: Supports multilingual workflows by translating user-generated or operational text while retaining context.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Support and Ticket Intelligence
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Classify incoming requests by urgency, intent, and sentiment to speed up routing and response quality.

governedContentOperations.title: Governed Content Operations
governedContentOperations.description: Apply policy-aware language filters and moderation checks with measurable precision and recall targets.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Text-Driven Business Insights
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Aggregate trends from documents, reviews, and communications to inform strategy and operational decisions.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Evaluation by Use Case
evaluationByUseCase.description: Models are benchmarked against domain-specific datasets before release decisions are made.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Human-in-the-Loop Safeguards
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: High-impact predictions include review paths, escalation rules, and transparent confidence signals.

continuousMonitoring.title: Continuous Monitoring
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, and quality degradation are tracked continuously so retraining and rollback are proactive.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Explore evolutionary computation in an interactive environment and see how the same principles translate into production optimization systems.

scientificFoundation.title: Scientific Foundation
scientificFoundation.description: Genetic algorithms are population-based optimization methods inspired by natural selection and adaptation.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Interactive Evolution Environment
interactiveEnvironment.description: Run the simulation to see fitness improve generation by generation and observe how selection pressure influences outcomes.

productionUse.title: How Horizon Uses This in Production
productionUse.description: The same search mechanics used in this demo inform optimization pipelines deployed in operational systems.

applicationDomains.title: Broader Application Domains
applicationDomains.description: Evolutionary optimization is especially valuable in systems with dynamic objectives and conflicting constraints.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Instead of searching for one solution at a time, genetic algorithms evolve a diverse population of candidates. Each generation is evaluated against a fitness function and refined through selection, crossover, and mutation.
scientificFoundation.intro2: This makes them effective for high-dimensional problems with non-linear constraints, where deterministic approaches become brittle or computationally expensive.

selection.title: Selection
selection.description: High-performing candidates are more likely to survive and influence the next generation.

crossover.title: Crossover
crossover.description: Strong traits are recombined to create new candidate solutions with mixed strengths.

mutation.title: Mutation
mutation.description: Controlled randomness introduces diversity so search does not stall around local optima.

convergence.title: Convergence
convergence.description: Over many generations, populations trend toward stable, high-quality solutions.

resourceScheduling.title: Resource Scheduling
resourceScheduling.description: We use evolutionary strategies to optimize multi-constraint scheduling where brute-force search is infeasible.

architectureTuning.title: Architecture Tuning
architectureTuning.description: Candidate infrastructure configurations are evaluated iteratively to improve performance and cost efficiency.

continuousOptimization.title: Continuous Optimization
continuousOptimization.description: Optimization jobs run in controlled loops with telemetry feedback so systems adapt as demand profiles shift.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Route & Logistics Planning
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Complex delivery and dispatch planning benefits from evolutionary search when constraints change rapidly.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Model and Hyperparameter Search
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Genetic search can discover high-quality model configurations when objective surfaces are noisy and non-linear.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Portfolio and Allocation Problems
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimization under competing objectives can be framed as fitness tradeoffs across evolving candidate sets.
